name: tag
title: Tag
description: A small pill-shaped label. Use to categorise, label status, attribute metadata, or summarise a property of a parent element. The wrapper re-exports `Badge` from `badge/`.

meta.docs:
# Tag A small pill-shaped label. Use to categorise, label status, attribute metadata, or summarise a property of a parent element. The wrapper re-exports `Badge` from `badge/`. ## When to use - **Brand-coloured status label** — ``. Same pill shape as Carbon's `Tag`. - **Quiet category label** — `` for neutral/grey backgrounds. - **Error / danger marker** — ``. - **Outlined label** — `` for low-emphasis tags inside dense layouts. - **Linked tag** — `{label}` keeps anchor semantics with badge styling. - **With icon** — render the icon as a child; `[&>svg]:size-3` is wired automatically. ## When not to use - **Action triggers** — use `Button`, not a clickable badge. - **Form-control toggles** — use `Toggle` or `Checkbox`. - **Long-form descriptive text** — keep tags short; use a `

` for prose. - **Dismissible filter chip** — there is no built-in close button; render an inline `
meta.migrationGuide: # Tag — Carbon → shadcn migration guide ## Naming - Carbon: `Tag`. - shadcn: `Badge`. Same shape (small pill-shaped label), different name. ## Mapping | Concept | Carbon `Tag` | shadcn `Badge` | |---|---|---| | Wrapper | `{text}` | `{text}` | | Text content | children | children | | Colour family | `type="red"/"magenta"/"purple"/"blue"/"cyan"/"teal"/"green"/"gray"/"cool-gray"/"warm-gray"/"high-contrast"/"outline"` (12 variants) | `variant="default"/"secondary"/"destructive"/"outline"/"ghost"/"link"` (6 variants) | | Filter / dismissible | `filter` + `onClose` props | not modeled — render an inline X button manually | | Icon | `renderIcon={Icon}` | render the icon as a child of `` | | Sizes | `size="sm"/"md"/"lg"` | none — restyle padding/text-size via Tailwind | | As link / clickable | `as="a" href` | `…` | | Disabled | `disabled` | `` | ## Carbon features missing in shadcn - **12 colour variants** — Carbon's `type` prop ships full palette (red, magenta, purple, blue, cyan, teal, green, gray, cool-gray, warm-gray, high-contrast, outline). shadcn's `variant` ships 6 (default / secondary / destructive / outline / ghost / link). To match the Carbon palette, extend `badgeVariants` with custom entries: ```ts // Add to badgeVariants in badge.shadcn.tsx (or override locally) red: 'bg-red-100 text-red-900 dark:bg-red-900/30 dark:text-red-200', blue: 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-900 dark:bg-blue-900/30 dark:text-blue-200', green: 'bg-green-100 text-green-900 dark:bg-green-900/30 dark:text-green-200', // etc. ``` - **`filter` boolean + built-in close button** — Carbon's filter-tag variant. shadcn requires manual composition: ```tsx {label} ``` - **`onClose` callback** — paired with `filter`. Use the manual recipe above and own the state. - **`renderIcon` prop** — Carbon's render-prop for a leading icon. shadcn: just put the icon as a child (`[&>svg]:size-3` is already wired for SVG sizing). - **`size="sm"/"md"/"lg"`** — Carbon's three density variants. shadcn ships one size; restyle via Tailwind (`text-[10px] px-1.5 py-0` for sm, `text-sm px-3 py-1` for lg). - **`title` prop** — Carbon's tooltip on hover (showing full text when truncated). shadcn: wrap with `` if needed. - **Skeleton variant (``)** — Carbon ships skeletons. shadcn has none — use the generic `skeleton` primitive. - **`disabled` prop** — Carbon greys it out. shadcn: `className="opacity-50 pointer-events-none"` or `aria-disabled`. ## shadcn features missing in Carbon - **`asChild` slot** — `{label}` makes the badge a real link without nested elements. Carbon's `as` prop is similar but less idiomatic. - **`link` variant** — shadcn ships a "link"-styled badge variant (text-coloured, underline-on-hover). Carbon has no equivalent. - **`ghost` variant** — transparent-bg, hover-only fill. Carbon: would build manually. - **Tailwind composability** — every prop accepts `className` for one-off tweaks. - **`focus-visible:ring`** — shadcn adds a focus ring when used as a focusable element (`asChild` link). Carbon's `Tag` uses default focus styles. ## Behavioural differences - **Default element** — Carbon: `` (or `
